name: GJB2 300kb region (ENCODE K562 CTCF + H3K27ac)
description: 300kb window spanning the GJB2/GJB6/GJA3 connexin gene cluster on chr13q12.11. GJB2 (Connexin-26) mutations are the most common cause of autosomal recessive non-syndromic hearing loss (DFNB1A). GJB6 (Connexin-30) deletions (del(GJB6-D13S1830), 309kb) remove regulatory elements upstream of GJB2. CTCF sites from ENCODE K562 ChIP-seq (ENCFF736NYC, ENCSR000DWE, IDR narrowPeak, GRCh38). H3K27ac from ENCODE K562 (ENCFF864OSZ, ENCSR000AKP). NOTE: GJB2 is NOT expressed in K562 (cochlear/skin gene in erythroid cell line) — this is an intentional tissue-mismatch benchmark, similar to the SCN5A negative control. Expected: minimal ARCHCODE structural discrimination, confirming tissue-specificity requirement.

enhancers.name: GJB2_TSS
enhancers.note: GJB2 transcription start site (XM_011535049.3, minus strand, TSS at txEnd=20,192,938). NOT expressed in K562 (cochlear/skin specific). MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy=0.3 reflecting non-expressing cell type — no H3K27ac at this position

enhancers.name: GJA3_TSS
enhancers.note: GJA3 (Connexin-46) TSS (NM_021954.4, minus strand). Cataracts gene. Not expressed in K562

enhancers.name: upstream_H3K27ac_1
enhancers.note: H3K27ac peak (20,120,130-20,120,646, signal=9.29, -log10q=14.88). Near LOC105370101. Strongest H3K27ac in the window

enhancers.name: upstream_H3K27ac_2
enhancers.note: H3K27ac peak (20,119,040-20,120,074, signal=5.23, -log10q=6.41). Adjacent to upstream_H3K27ac_1

ctcf_sites.name: GJA3_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strongest CTCF in window (20,163,504-20,163,646, signal=129.12). In GJA3 gene region

ctcf_sites.name: upstream_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF upstream (20,136,891-20,136,988, signal=100.34). Near LOC124903128

ctcf_sites.name: GJB2_promoter_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF near GJB2 (20,189,183-20,189,453, signal=70.72). ~3.5kb upstream of GJB2 TSS. Potential insulator/boundary element

ctcf_sites.name: GJA3_GJB2_intergenic_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF between GJA3 and GJB2 (20,182,308-20,182,578, signal=69.71)

ctcf_sites.name: GJB2_downstream_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF downstream of GJB2 (20,197,403-20,197,673, signal=58.63). ~4.5kb from GJB2 3' end

ctcf_sites.name: far_upstream_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF far upstream (20,118,201-20,118,471, signal=30.69). Near LOC105370101. Co-localizes with H3K27ac peaks

clinical_significance._note: GJB2 mutations cause DFNB1A (autosomal recessive non-syndromic hearing loss). Most common: c.35delG (p.Gly12ValfsTer2), c.167delT (p.Leu56ArgfsTer26), c.235delC (p.Leu79CysfsTer3). GJB6 del(GJB6-D13S1830) is a 309kb deletion removing regulatory elements.
clinical_significance.gene_function: Gap junction protein, intercellular communication in cochlear hair cells

tissue_mismatch_note: GJB2 is expressed in cochlear supporting cells, skin, and liver — NOT in K562 (erythroid). This is an INTENTIONAL tissue-mismatch benchmark, designed to test whether ARCHCODE shows reduced discrimination when the cell-type-specific regulatory landscape does not match the gene's expression pattern. Expected result: weak or null structural signal (similar to SCN5A cardiac gene in K562).
_thresholds_note: Not calibrated for 300x300 matrix. GJB2 is tissue-mismatched (cochlear gene in K562 erythroid) — expect reduced structural discrimination. Requires empirical calibration if sensitivity is sufficient.
